identity.name: QZap
identity.description: A high-energy, mobile-first quiz platform for students that feels like a game, not a test.

usage_rules.background: Use off-white #F8F9FC for main app background to reduce eye strain.
usage_rules.cards: Use pure white #FFFFFF for cards with shadow-sm.
usage_rules.primary_action: Use Indigo #4F46E5 for primary buttons only.
usage_rules.gamification: Use Amber #F59E0B for points, trophies, and streaks.

buttons.base: h-12 px-6 font-semibold transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:border-indigo-200 hover:bg-indigo-50

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm rounded-3xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.base: h-12 bg-slate-50 border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-100 transition-all rounded-xl

navigation.mobile_bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-slate-200 flex justify-around items-center z-50
navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-slate-900 on white backgrounds. Use text-white on primary buttons.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Use prefers-reduced-motion media query to disable complex animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for all Headings (H1-H3) and 'Inter' for Body text.
Implement the mobile navigation bar as a fixed bottom component for screens < md.
Use the 'Bento' grid layout for the dashboard: Large block for 'Current Level/Points', smaller blocks for 'Quick Actions'.
For the Quiz Interface: Display one question at a time (Card Stack style) with a progress bar at the top.
Ensure the 'Camera' upload button is prominent (Floating Action Button style on mobile dashboard).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids and negative space.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable (p-6, p-8).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 in the UI.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
